title: figtracer: plain-text, provenance-tracked lab records from bench protocol to publication figure
description: A command-line toolkit that keeps a lab's records — bench protocols, analysis figures, written lab notes, and project state — consistent, versioned, and plain-text, threading each figure to the code and git commit that produced it across R and Python.

creators.name: Priest, David
creators.affiliation: Wing Lab, Center for Infectious Disease Education and Research (CIDER), Osaka University, Japan
